metadata.title: Studio Échelle — Luxury Interior Design & Architecture
metadata.description: High-end interior design and architecture studio based in Doha, Qatar. Specialising in luxury residential villas, commercial projects, and landscape design across the GCC.

hero.title: Designed for Permanence
hero.tagline: We design with love, for form, for material, and for the people who live with our work.

statement.manifesto: Every detail is intentional. Every project, personal.
statement.extended: We believe great design quietly transforms space and stirs feeling.

interior.name: Interior Design
interior.description: Crafting refined residential and commercial interiors that balance material authenticity with spatial harmony.

architecture.name: Architectural Design
architecture.description: Shaping structures that resonate with their surroundings through thoughtful form, proportion, and light.

landscape.name: Landscape Design
landscape.description: Extending living spaces outward with considered planting, hardscape, and seamless indoor-outdoor transitions.

fitout.name: Fit-Out Supervision
fitout.description: Overseeing every detail of execution to ensure design intent is faithfully realised on site.

projectManagement.name: Project Management
projectManagement.description: End-to-end coordination from tender through handover. Procurement support, contractor management, and programme monitoring.

servicesPage.title: What We Do
servicesPage.subtitle: From concept to completion, we offer a full spectrum of design services tailored to the unique character of each project.

s1.name: Interior Design
s1.description: Full-scope residential and commercial interiors from concept through delivery. We work across all scales, from intimate apartments to large villa complexes and commercial developments.

s2.name: Architectural Design
s2.description: Spatial planning, façade design, and architectural documentation. We collaborate with structural and MEP engineers to deliver complete, coordinated packages.

s3.name: Landscape Design
s3.description: Outdoor living spaces, gardens, pool surrounds, and landscape masterplans. We extend the interior language into the exterior.

s4.name: Fit-Out Supervision
s4.description: On-site oversight ensuring the design intent is delivered with precision. We attend site regularly, review shop drawings, and coordinate contractors.

s5.name: Project Management
s5.description: End-to-end coordination from tender through handover. Procurement support, contractor management, and programme monitoring.

about.heading: A studio built on the belief that great design endures.
about.description: Échelle is an interior and exterior design firm with expertise in residential, commercial and retail projects. Based in Doha, Qatar, we combine extraordinary talent and global experiences to create spaces, nationally and worldwide, that can be as cutting edge or timeless as the exceptionality of each of our clients.
about.value1: We design with intention. Every material, every proportion, every detail is considered.
about.value2: We listen before we design. The best spaces emerge from deep understanding of the people who inhabit them.
about.value3: We build for permanence. Not trends, not moments, but spaces that improve with time.

contact.thankYou: Thank you — we'll be in touch within 48 hours.

footer.tagline: We design with love, for form, for material, and for the people who live with our work.
